title: arco's funny modpack
description:
it has optimize things and makes ur life better with some quality stuff
(modpack not to be confused with the Arcomua modpacks)
body:
this modpack adds some optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, C2ME, etc
hey also this pack adds fun QoL mods and mods that make the game look better like uhh Iris Shaders, Chat heads, and other stuff.
this modpack can increase framerates (good) and make ur life better with quality features and better looks (also good) so pls download
